cards.back: A visual representation of ideas and solutions to design problems, used in the design thinking process
There are two main types: Low-Fidelity Sketching (quick, simple drawings) and High-Fidelity Sketching (more detailed, polished drawings)
To quickly explore and prototype ideas, to communicate design concepts to stakeholders, and to test and refine designs

cards.front: Key principles of effective Sketching in UI/UX
cards.back: Keep it simple, be quick, focus on functionality, and iterate and refine
Improved communication, faster prototyping, increased creativity, and better design decisions
